Best place with reasonable price near the beach

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 5-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText: Thank you so much for your wonderful review! We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay with us and found our location convenient for your dolphin-watching and snorkeling adventures. It was a pleasure having you as our guest at Teupin Layeu Hotel. We truly appreciate your kind words and hope to welcome you back again in the future for another memorable stay. Safe travels, and see you next time..
comments.reviewComments: This new hotel is excellent for those who want to go for dolphin and snorkeling tour. Its just 2 minute away from the boat jetty. We love it here.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room is spacious, clean, with a direct view of the beach, the service is friendly, the air conditioning is cold, and the bed is large.
comments.originalComment: Kamarnya luas , bersih, bisa lihat pemandangan pantai langsung, pelayananyaa juga ramah, acnya dingin, kasurnyaa lebar

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText: Terima kasi papa barbershop atas kunjungannya dihotel kami, thanks jg buat ide2 cemerlangnya, banyak pengalaman2 yg papa tuangkan ke pola pikir kami kedepannya Insya Alloh sangat berguna dan berfaedah sangat.. kami menuggu kehadiran kembali ke kota kami, sukses selalu buat kita semua..
comments.reviewComments: tidak menyesal sama sekali menginap di sini,ada parkir motor,dan owner hotel yang sangat baik dan friendly..saya sangat senang dan tidak menyesal menginap di hotel ini..kalian juga akan merasai jika menginap di hotel ini..
comments.reviewTitle: hotel yang sangat baru dan sangat barsih

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
The room was excellent, spacious, clean and very comfortable. The shower was particularly good, with strong water pressure. Breakfast was outstanding, very substantial. The location is superb, offering a fantastic, postcard-like view of the bay.
The staff were wonderful. Ali, Dewi and Ramlan all went the extra mile to accommodate me; they were exceptionally kind and helpful. I feel very fortunate to have stayed here and would strongly recommend it.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText: Terimakasih kk atas ulasan nya, kami sangat Terima dengan masukan nya untuk melengkapi apa yg kurang dari properti kami, Terima kasih.
comments.reviewComments:
Cleanliness, service, price, beeeeeeeehhhhhh the best
This is an honest review as honest as possible
With that price, you get that facility and great cleanliness
As a suggestion, provide a tap below, so you can wash your feet if they're dirty from the beach. Because the hotel is really clean.
comments.originalComment:
Kebersihan , pelayanan, harga , beeeeeeeehhhhhh terbaikkkkk
Ini ulasan jujur sejujur² nya 
Dengan harga segitu dapat fasilitas segitu dan kebersihan yg mantep 
Untuk saran , dibawah kasih keran , jadi untuk cuci2 kaki kalau kotor dari pantai. Soalnya hotelnya bersih kaliiiiii
